uncovered_waiver.reason: OMN-14816 hand-flips node_broker_disk_watermark_compute to canonical def-B via a PURE RENAME probe_disk_watermark->handle (OMN-14781 path): the probe body is preserved byte-identically and the business-logic helpers (_classify / _probe_path / _real_docker_info / _real_disk_usage / _resolve_volume_mountpoint) are re-derived byte-identical base_ref<->HEAD by the ratchet from git. Equivalence is proven by that git-verbatim preservation plus the green runtime-dispatch parity tests over the selected input corpus, not by a broad branch-coverage claim over the legacy handler body; the real docker/shutil subprocess helpers (_real_docker_info / _real_disk_usage / _resolve_volume_mountpoint) are network/daemon-dependent and are exercised by the existing patched unit suite, so they are stubbed in the deterministic dispatch corpus.
